metadata.title: CardWise target-issuer official-source enrichment
metadata.unknownPolicy: Every unsupported field is explicit null with status=unknown. No terms are inferred from card names, editorial categories, or third-party aggregators.
metadata.sourcePolicy: Official issuer catalogues, product pages, schedules, MITC/KFS and product terms only.
metadata.accessNotes: AU Bank pages returned Cloudflare verification/HTTP 403 during this check, so AU product economics remain null except catalogue facts already captured. Other issuer catalogue surfaces and listed official terms were accessible.

value: With a unique contactless feature and a card design that enables you to make fast, convenient and secure everyday purchases, the Legend Visa Credit Card helps you earn more reward points on your weekend spends as well as Bonus points on your yearly spends!
Earn 1 reward point for every ₹ 100 spent on Weekdays and earn 2 reward points for every ₹ 100 spent on Weekends.
Exclusive Bonus Rewards

With a unique contactless feature and a card design that enables you to make fast, convenient and secure everyday purchases, the Legend Visa Credit Card helps you earn more reward points on your weekend spends as well as Bonus points on your yearly spends!
Fuel Surcharge Waiver

Experience the new way to pay as you can use Credit, Rewards or EMI option while purchasing your favorite items at the store.
